name: Folo
summary: AI RSS reader in the RSSHub ecosystem for personalized feed consumption.
notes: Useful reference for the reader layer adjacent to News Report.
Closer to end-user reading experience than agent middleware.

name: Inoreader Intelligence Reports
summary: RSS reading product with automated intelligence reporting features.
notes: Useful as a benchmark for reporting UX and scheduled briefing workflows.
Not an agent-first or open integration surface yet.

name: RSSHub
summary: Open source feed generation infrastructure that turns many web sources into RSS.
notes: Important upstream building block for source normalization.
Relevant as infrastructure rather than a briefing product.

name: Readwise CLI
summary: CLI access to saved reading data that can be composed into agent workflows.
notes: Strong bridge between personal knowledge workflows and agent automation.
Depends on the user's upstream Readwise usage.

name: Podwise CLI
summary: Podcast summarization and transcript workflow with CLI and MCP support.
notes: A strong example of vertical tool design for agent consumption.
Good reference for how News Report can expose structured outputs.
